utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , umm , it is this tragic love story between Cathy and Heathcliff and umm , it takes place on like these really creepy mores in England .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Which I think represents the wildness of Heathcliff character . I totally get symbolism .

utterances.speaker: The Teacher
utterances.text: How would you characterize the theme of this book , uh let see here , Rachel Green ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Umm , well I would have to say that it is a , it is tragic love story .

utterances.speaker: The Teacher
utterances.text: Well , that is sort of a given , but yes . Anyone else ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh ... oh ... oh , symbolism ! And uh , the ... the uh , wildness of the mores , which I think is ... is mirrored in the wildness of Heathcliff character .

utterances.speaker: The Teacher
utterances.text: Excellent ! What Rachel has shrewdly observed here

emotion_cause.span: 7_Excellent ! What Rachel has shrewdly observed here

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well , honey that was pretty obvious .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well how would you know ? ! You did not even read it !

utterances.speaker: The Teacher
utterances.text: What do you think ? You in the blue shirt .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I think that uh , yours is a question with many answers .

utterances.speaker: The Teacher
utterances.text: Would you care to venture one ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Would you care to venture one ?

utterances.speaker: The Teacher
utterances.text: Are you just repeating what I am saying ?
